---
title: "Maximiliane Jousse"
image: media/Headshot.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 250px
  links:
   - icon: envelope-fill
     href: mailto:maximiliane.jousse@mail.mcgill.ca
   - icon: github
     href: https://github.com/MJousse
   - icon: google
     href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=AW09MXEAAAAJ&hl=fr
   - icon: linkedin
     href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maximiliane-jousse-5aa751178/
---

Welcome to my website :) I am a Quantitative Life Sciences PhD Student in Dr. Laura Pollock's [Lab](<https://qbiodiversity.org/>) at McGill University in Montreal, Canada.

My PhD research centers on biotic interactions in macroecology. Specifically, i look at integrating trophic interactions in species distribution models to better model the effects of climate change on species distributions. For more information check out my [Research](https://mjousse.github.io/research.html) tab!
